result.stderr:
devcontainer 1.3.5
Copyright (C) 2026 Ani Balasubramaniam

  init          Initialize a devcontainer from a template or custom set of
                options

  activate      Activate the specified devcontainer files (devcontainer rebuild
                may be necessary)

  deactivate    Deactivate the active devcontainer

  ls            List all available devcontainers

  run           Run a one-off command in a new instance of the active
                devcontainer

  start         Start active devcontainer

  stop          Stop active devcontainer

  status        Show status of the active devcontainer

  exec          Execute a command in an existing instance of the active
                devcontainer

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

result.stderr:
devcontainer 1.3.5
Copyright (C) 2026 Ani Balasubramaniam

  -n, --name              

  --shutdown-action       (Default: stopCompose) The action to perform when the
                          root shell exits

  -s, --shell             (Default: /bin/bash) The default shell to start

  -d, --dockerfile        (Default: Dockerfile) The Dockerfile to use as a base
                          for the devcontainer

  -o, --overwrite         (Default: false) Overwrite any existing files

  -w, --workspace-root    (Default: .)

  --disable-hooks         (Default: false) Don't run any hooks when activating
                          the template

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

  value pos. 0            (Default: default) The id of the template to use

  value pos. 1            (Default: .) The directory to use as the devcontainer
                          build context
